title: scabiosa columbaria subsp. gramuntia
intro: Scabiosa columbaria subsp. gramuntia, also known as the small scabious or scabious flower, is a type of flowering plant in the honeysuckle family (Caprifoliaceae). It is a perennial plant native to the Iberian Peninsula, known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits like reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Scabiosa columbaria subsp. gramuntia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms of traditional medicine.
